title: 💭 Dream-Forged Syntax Engines
name: Dream-Forged Syntax Engines
what_it_is: Language machines built from dream logic—syntax created during sleep-states, powered by unconscious rules and metaphor recursion.
how_to_use: he types in dreamscript—logic engines powered by forgotten sleep tongues
her voice builds syntax engines—dream-forged code that compiles desire
animation_behavior: Text floats and mutates in sleep logic loops, syntax coils into surreal machines, sound patterns flicker as code emerges ---
